titleStmt.title: SII 17.735: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 735. (A.R. No. 678 of 1904.) TIRUMULLAVĀYAL, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a second pillar in the maṇḍapa of the central shrine in the Māśilāmaṇīśvara temple.
This damaged inscription begins with the praśasti commencing with Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara, etc., of the king.

It records the deed pertaining to the sale of 4000 kuḻi of land, by the members of the sabhā of Ambattūr in Ambattūr-nāḍu in Puḻaṟ-kōṭṭam to a Veḷḷān of Villippākkam and entrusted to the authorities of the temple of Tirumullaivāyil-uḍaiyār, for burning a prpetual lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Iru nila maṭantaiyum porcceyap pāvaiyum cirttaṉic
celviyum taṉ perunteviyarāki yiṉpuṟa neṭitiyalūḻiyuḷ ḷiṭaituṟai nāṭum tuṭarva ṉaveli
ppaṭar vaṉavāciyuñ cuḷḷic cūḻ matiṭk koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟkarumuraṇ maṇ ṇaikkaṭakkamum po
rukaṭaliḻattaraicar tam muṭiyu māṅkavar teviya roṅkeḻil muṭiyum muṉṉavar pakkal(ta) ten
ṉavaṉ vaiytta cuntara muṭiyu mintiraṉāramu n=teṇṭirai yiḻamaṇṭala muḻu
vatu meṟipaṭai kkeraḷan muṟaimaiyil cūṭuṅ kulatanamākiya palar pukaḻ muṭiyuñce
ṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatir velait tol peruṅkāvaṟ palapaḻan=tīvuñ ceruviṟ cinavilirupa
ttorukā laraicukaḷai kaṭṭa paracirāmar melvaruñ cāntimaṟṟivaraṇ karuti yiruttiyacempoṟṟiruttaku
muṭiyu māp perutaṇṭāṟ koṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāna śrīrājendracoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 7 Āvatu jeyaṅkoṇ
ṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu puḻaṟ koṭṭattu Ampattūr nāṭṭu Ampattūr sabhaiyom nila vilaiyā
vaṇak kai Eḻuttu ttu kānap tevatānam tirumullaivāyil teva
pakkal Ikkoṭṭattu Ampattūr nāṭṭu tevatānam villipākkattu veḷ ḷāṉ
ce taṇṭata teva maṉ mākak kuṭutta poṉṉil poṉ koṇṭu nāṅkaḷ tiruna
n=tāviḷakku Onṟinukku viṟkiṉṟa nilattukku kīḻpāṟkellai lay Iraṇṭukku meṟ
kun teṉpāṟkellai paḷḷi Erikku vaṭakkum kiḻapānkellai
ku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai ku kkālu ṟṟukku vaṭakkum melpā ṟkkellai
nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai meṟpaṭi kollaikku teṟku nānkellaikkuḷ
nila peruṅkāṇi kuḻiyum kkaḷarum niṅkalāka patiṉeṇ cāṇkolāl muṉ ṉūṟu kuḻi
nāṅkaḷ viṟkinṟa nilattu kiḻpāṟkellai peri Eri nila ṉakkaṉ
meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai Ūrmañcikka ttukku vaṭakku melpāṟ kellai
kallai kalavā ṇiyankuḻikku teṟku Orukaṇṇin teṟkum Inṉānkellaiyuḷ
kolāl Āka nāṅkaḷ viṟṟanilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai mañcikkattukku meṟkkum teṉpāṟ
kkellai raikku vaṭakkum melpāṟke
llai rāja ccaruppetimaṅkalattukku kiḻa
kkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ūr mañcikkattu
kkutteṟkkum Innāṟkellaiyuḷḷakappa
ṭṭa nilam kuḻi Iraṇṭāyiramum Āka kuḻi nālā
yiramuṅ koṇṭu Oru tirunun=tāviḷakku Erip
pomānom tirumullaivāyiluṭaiyār tevakanmicuḷom Itu panmā
heśvarara�kṣai- .
Digital edition of SII 17.735 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
